# AskEasy

> AskEasy is a calm, beautifully simple AI assistant. Ask anything — text, voice, camera, or documents — in 10 languages with a cute mascot named Easy.

## About
- Name: AskEasy
- Tagline: The easiest AI you'll ever use
- Mascot: Easy — a friendly chat companion

## Features
- Multi-model chat (Gemini, GPT-4o mini, GPT-4o) via OpenRouter
- 10 languages with per-bot memory
- Voice input (hold-to-talk) and text-to-speech
- PDF upload with document Q&A
- Web search with citations (Focus mode)
- Persona-based accessibility (kid / teen / grown-up / elder)
- Reduce-motion and Private Mode toggles

## Pages
- / — Home
- /bots — Choose or create a bot
- /chat/$botId — Chat
- /auth — Sign in
- /onboarding — First-run persona setup
